memberdef.name: g_fat_vfs_ops
memberdef.initializer: = { .open = syn_fat_vfs_open, .close = syn_fat_vfs_close, .read = syn_fat_vfs_read, .write = syn_fat_vfs_write, .seek = syn_fat_vfs_seek, .tell = syn_fat_vfs_tell, .unlink = syn_fat_vfs_unlink, .mkdir = NULL, .opendir = NULL, .readdir = NULL, .closedir = NULL }

memberdef.argsstring: (const FAT_Volume *vol, const char *fat_name, DirEntryLoc *loc, bool find_empty_slot)
memberdef.name: scan_root_dir

briefdescription.para: Get the VFS operations structure for the custom FAT filesystem.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the static SYN_VfsOps vtable.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the SD card and mount the FAT filesystem in VFS at /sd.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR on failure.
